steps.title: Translate the phrase
steps.content: "Twice the value of $x$" is $2x$. "$8$ more than" that amount means add $8$.

steps.title: Write y in terms of x
Confirm the choice
steps.content: $y=10x+2$ and the remaining alternative use slope $10$, and the remaining alternative swaps the $2$ and $8$. The correct value is $y=2x+8$, so B is correct.
